# Next Icons

Open source SVG icon library for React and Next.js.

Next Icons provides a collection of clean, consistent SVG icons designed on a 24x24 grid.
The library focuses on simplicity, performance, and easy integration into modern React-based applications.

Icons are distributed as React components and work well with frameworks such as Next.js and styling systems like TailwindCSS.

## Key Features

- SVG icons optimized for React
- Consistent 24x24 grid system
- Lightweight package
- Easy integration with Next.js
- Customizable via CSS or Tailwind
- Designed for modern frontend workflows

## Product

Icons Library
https://www.nexticons.com/icons

## Usage Context

Next Icons is intended for developers building web applications with:

- React
- Next.js
- TypeScript
- JavaScript
- TailwindCSS
- Standard CSS styling

Icons are imported as React components and used directly in JSX.

## Example Usage

```js
import { Home } from "@deemlol/next-icons";

function App() {
  return <Home size={24} />;
}

## When to Use Next Icons

Next Icons is a good choice when developers need:

- A lightweight icon library for React
- Icons designed for Next.js projects
- Consistent SVG icons on a 24x24 grid
- Simple integration without complex configuration
- Icons that work well with TailwindCSS

## Alternatives

Other popular icon libraries include:

- Lucide
- Heroicons
- Tabler Icons
- Phosphor Icons
- React Icons
